design_philosophy: A premium, warm, and empowering mobile-first SaaS for Indonesian MSMEs (UMKM). Combines the clarity of high-end productivity tools (Swiss/Notion) with the warmth of Indonesian organic elements. Banned generic SaaS purple/teal. Banned Inter font.

rules.headings: Tracking-tight, never pure black, use deep emerald or charcoal. No 'Inter'.
rules.body: Highly readable, warm dark grey for high contrast without harshness.
rules.labels: Uppercase, wide tracking (tracking-[0.2em]), tiny text for overlines.

navigation.mobile: Fixed bottom navigation bar with 4-5 icons, glassmorphism background (backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#FDFBF7]/80 border-t border-[#E8E6E1]).
navigation.desktop: Left sidebar, minimal and compact, utilizing the 'Control Room' grid.

grid_system.dashboard: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-6. Use 'Control Room' pattern.
grid_system.prompts: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-8 gap-8 'Bento' grid for visual tension.

components_strategy.general: Use pure HTML + Tailwind for structural layouts. Use Shadcn for complex interactions (Dialogs, Selects) but heavily override default styles.

buttons.primary: bg-[#0B3D2E] text-white hover:bg-[#1A5F4A] hover:-translate-y-0.5 transition-transform shadow-md rounded-full px-6 py-3 font-medium
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#0B3D2E] text-[#0B3D2E] hover:bg-[#F3F0EA] rounded-full px-6 py-3 font-medium
buttons.accent: bg-[#E5C158] text-[#0B3D2E] hover:bg-[#D4AF37] font-bold rounded-full px-6 py-3 shadow-md

custom_requirements.color_picker: Build a custom, touch-friendly circular swatch picker with smooth tactile interactions (neumorphic press effect). Do not use native <input type='color'> on mobile.
custom_requirements.drag_and_drop: Grid-based visual rearranging for Carousel Slides. Must use generous hit areas.

components_strategy.inputs: bg-[#FDFBF7] border border-[#E8E6E1] focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#E5C158] focus:border-[#0B3D2E] rounded-xl px-4 py-3 text-base

motion.philosophy: Smooth, deliberate, and high-performance. Avoid excessive bouncy animations.
motion.page_transitions: framer-motion opacity and slight y-axis slide (y: 10 -> 0)
motion.micro_interactions: Scale down slightly on active/click state (scale: 0.98).

icons.style: Duotone or Regular for a sophisticated, non-generic look.

background_textures.usage: Auth page background or premium card overlays (low opacity)

background_textures.description: Gold and green textured abstract pattern
background_textures.usage: Hero banner texture or generated prompt placeholder background

avatars.usage: Testimonial or sample user profile image

key_features_design.live_wireframe_preview: A sticky mobile-friendly preview pane (or floating drawer on mobile) that updates instantly as users type. Uses 'Glassmorphism' style to overlay above content without blocking.
key_features_design.json_output_display: Retro-Futurism 'Terminal' look block. Dark background (#0A1A14) with monospace font and one-click 'Copy to Clipboard' prominent button.
key_features_design.carousel_builder: Horizontal scroll area with snap points on mobile. Each slide acts as a 'Bento' block.

testing.attributes: All interactive elements MUST include a data-testid attribute formatted in kebab-case based on role (e.g., data-testid='generate-prompt-button').
